# fpcloud_webhook (Resource)

Manages a GitHub webhook for auto-deploy on a Fogpipe application.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "fpcloud_webhook" "autodeploy" {
  app_id        = fpcloud_app.web.id
  repo          = "myorg/webapp"
  branch        = "main"
  image_pattern = "ghcr.io/myorg/webapp:{{sha}}"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app_id` (String) The application ID this webhook belongs to.
- `image_pattern` (String) The container image pattern with template variables (e.g. ghcr.io/owner/repo:{{sha}}).
- `repo` (String) The GitHub repository in owner/repo format.

### Optional

- `branch` (String) The branch to watch for pushes.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The time the webhook was created.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the webhook is currently enabled.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the webhook.
- `webhook_secret` (String, Sensitive) The HMAC secret for webhook signature verification.
- `webhook_url` (String) The URL to configure in GitHub as the webhook endpoint.
